languages.text: "Мы выдвинемся вперед, доложим о вашем прибытии, а вы следуйте по тропе, не ошибетесь. Вам надо встретиться с полковником".
"We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."
languages.original_text: "Мы выдвинемся вперед, доложим о вашем прибытии, а вы следуйте по тропе, не ошибетесь. Вам надо встретиться с полковником".

traits.locale_text: "We'll move ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail; you can't miss it. You need to meet with the Colonel."
"We'll move ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail; you can't miss it. You need to meet with the Colonel."
"We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."
"We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."
"We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."

languages.text: "Wir gehen voraus und melden Eure Ankunft. Folgt einfach der Spur. Ist nicht zu verfehlen. Ihr müsst Euch mit dem Colonel treffen."
languages.original_text: "We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."

traits.locale_text: "Wir gehen voraus und melden Eure Ankunft. Folgt einfach der Spur. Ist nicht zu verfehlen. Ihr müsst Euch mit dem Colonel treffen."

languages.text: « Nous allons partir devant pour l'informer de votre arrivée. Suivez la piste, vous ne pouvez pas la manquer. Vous devez rencontrer le colonel. »
languages.original_text: "We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."

traits.locale_text: « Nous allons partir devant pour l'informer de votre arrivée. Suivez la piste, vous ne pouvez pas la manquer. Vous devez rencontrer le colonel. »

languages.text: «Muy bien, informaremos sobre su llegada. Siga el camino; no tiene pérdida. Tiene que reunirse con el coronel».
languages.original_text: "We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."

traits.locale_text: «Muy bien, informaremos sobre su llegada. Siga el camino; no tiene pérdida. Tiene que reunirse con el coronel».

languages.text: "Biz varışınızı bildirmek için önden gideceğiz. Yolu izlerseniz kaçırmazsınız. Albay'la görüşmeniz gerekiyor."
languages.original_text: "We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."

traits.locale_text: "Biz varışınızı bildirmek için önden gideceğiz. Yolu izlerseniz kaçırmazsınız. Albay'la görüşmeniz gerekiyor."

languages.text: “我们先去通报你们的到来。沿着这条路走就行，不会迷路的。你得去见上校。”
languages.original_text: "We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."

traits.locale_text: “我们先去通报你们的到来。沿着这条路走就行，不会迷路的。你得去见上校。”

languages.text: 「到着を報告します。道はわかりやすいので、迷うことはないでしょう。大佐と会う必要があります。」
languages.original_text: "We'll go ahead to report your arrival. Just follow the trail, you can't miss it. You need to meet with the colonel."

traits.locale_text: 「到着を報告します。道はわかりやすいので、迷うことはないでしょう。大佐と会う必要があります。」
